welcome.title: Barka da zuwa AjoLedger
welcome.body: Muna sabunta ajiyar al'umma da gaskiya, amana, da sauƙi, tare da kiyaye al'adun Ajo da kuka saba da ita.

recorded.title: Kowace Biyan Kuɗi. Ana Rubuta Ta Atomatik.
recorded.body: Babu ƙarin takardun lissafi ko rasit. Ana bin diddigin kowace biyan kuɗi ta atomatik, don ku ga ajiyarku a kowane lokaci.

confidence.title: Bi Ajiyarku da Kwarin Gwiwa.
confidence.body: San matsayin biyan kuɗinku, biyan kuɗin da ke zuwa, da ci gaban ajiyarku a cikin dashboard mai sauƙi da aka tsara ga kowa.

auth.createPinSubtitle: Za ka yi amfani da wannan PIN don buɗe app.
auth.enterPinSubtitle: Shigar da PIN mai lamba 4 don ci gaba.
auth.mockModeHint: Demo mode — auth runs locally without the backend.
auth.socialComingSoonTitle: Yana zuwa nan ba da jimawa ba
auth.socialComingSoonBody: Shiga ta Google da Apple za su kasance idan backend ya shirya.

errors.invalidEmail: Imel ba daidai ba ne. Sake gwadawa.
errors.weakPassword: Kalmar sirri dole ta kasance aƙalla haruffa 8. Sake gwadawa.
errors.pinMismatch: PINs ba su dace ba. Sake gwadawa.
errors.generic: Wani abu ya faru. Sake gwadawa.

home.overviewSubtitle: Ga nan ne bayanin ajiyar ku
home.dueInDaysWithDate: Za a yi biya cikin kwanaki {{count}} • {{date}}

errors.generic: Wani abu ya faru. Da fatan za a sake gwadawa.

home.comingSoonTitle: Yana zuwa nan ba da jimawa ba
home.comingSoonBody: Wannan allo zai kasance a sabuntawa mai zuwa.

contributionReminder.title: Tunatarwar biyan kuɗi
contributionReminder.subtitle: Biyan kuɗinka na gaba ya yi lokaci
